description: Flips (reflects) the compass across its arm line, mirroring its orientation
utility: Mirror the compass to draw on the opposite side of its arm

examples.scenario: Flip compass and draw arcs on both sides
examples.expression: G = g2d(-10, 10, -10, 10); compassarc(G, point(G, 0, 0), radius(4), range(0, 90)); compassflip(G); compassarc(G, range(0, 90))
